title: Montreux, Vaud — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Montreux, Vaud: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Montreux is a city in Vaud with a population of 26,000. A glamorous resort town on Lake Geneva’s shores, famous for the Montreux Jazz Festival, the Chillon Castle, and its stunning Alpine and lake views.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
